channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Leica Chairman says 'a true Leica sensor' is coming, and image quality may never be the same
item.description: Leica is co-developing a bespoke 'true Leica sensor' with Chinese sensor manufacturer Gpixel for the next generation of Leica cameras. Here's what we can expect.

item.title: Comment l’Apple Vision Pro a changé le tournage de Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
item.description: L’Apple Vision Pro a été utilisé sur le tournage du film The Mandalorian & Grogu. Grâce au casque de réalité mixte d'Apple, le réalisateur Jon Favreau a pu se retrouver dans une salle de cinéma vIrtuelle présentant un écran au format IMAX.

item.title: Crimson Desert's biggest update yet has arrived, adding three new difficulty modes and storage content, as Pearl Abyss teases a new way to 'face off against the bosses of your choice' soon
item.description: Pearl Abyss has released Crimson Desert's biggest update yet, which adds a plethora of new content, while also teasing more to come.

item.title: 'Prices are probably going to be so bad, no one will be able to afford the things anyway': worrying rumor aired on the cost of Microsoft's next-gen Surface devices
item.description: New rumor about Microsoft's next Surface devices suggests they'll be expensive and delayed.

item.title: Salmon raises $100M in equity and debt to bring digital credit to underbanked Filipinos
item.description: Salmon is targeting underbanked Filipinos, with little to no credit history, as well as people unhappy with the incumbent lenders' reliability issues.

item.title: Game Pass : après la baisse de prix, Microsoft va totalement refondre le service
item.description: En une semaine, la nouvelle patronne de Xbox a baissé les prix du Game Pass, retiré Call of Duty et annoncé un partenariat avec Discord. Difficile de suivre le rythme.

item.title: DJI’s new Lito Series beginner drones start at less than $400
item.description: Following teasers and leaks, DJI has officially announced its new entry-level Lito 1 and Lito X1 drones that both weigh less than 249 grams so they're not subjected to registration requirements in many countries. Neither drone is currently available in the US, but European pricing starts at €339 (around $397) for the Lito 1, and […]

item.title: Honor 600 Pro : ce nouveau smartphone surpuissant se lance avec 200 € de moins et plein de cadeaux à la clé
item.description: Le Honor 600 Pro vient de sortir et il est déjà en promotion ! Son constructeur lui retire 200 euros sur son prix de vente et le met dans un pack avec un vidéoprojecteur ou une tablette au choix.

item.title: Vercel says some of its customers’ data was stolen prior to its recent hack
item.description: The app and website hosting company has found evidence of a second compromise of customer accounts after expanding its initial investigation following a breach in early April.

item.title: Pourquoi le piratage de France Titres (ANTS) aurait pu être évité d’après un spécialiste
item.description: Un expert en cybersécurité montpelliérain raconte comment l'ANTS n'aurait pas fait preuve de bonne volonté pour corriger des failles pourtant signalées. Dont l'une probablement utilisée par le pirate.

item.title: 'I was printing labels within ten minutes of opening the box': This can't-miss deal on the best shipping label printer our printing expert has ever tested is a dream for small businesses and retailers
item.description: This one's quick, quiet, reliable, and actually fun to use.

item.title: 'Could be the best open earbuds yet' — Honor's new clips solve my biggest open earbud problem, and I'm already ready to hand out awards
item.description: The Honor Choice Earbuds Clip 2 Pro have anti-sound-leaking tech, to solve a major open earbud woe.

item.title: Turkey wants to ban social media for kids under 15
item.description: The Turkish parliament has voted through a bill that would ban all children under the age of 15 from using social media. As part of the legislation, social media platforms would be required to enforce age-verification measures on their apps, provide parental control tools, and react more quickly to harmful content being posted. As reported by The Associated Press, lawmakers have passed the bill in the wake of two deadly school shootings in Turkey, after which police arrested 162 people accused of sharing footage of the tragedies online. Turkey’s President Recep Tayyip Erdogan now has 15 days t...

item.title: DJI fans will miss out on 25 drone and camera launches this year thanks to FCC ban — as appeal reveals $1.5 billion financial hit causing the company 'immediate and grave harm'
item.description: DJI is throwing itself into a full appeal of its ban in the US, and it wants to see action taken immediately.

item.title: Gemini : comment supprimer son historique de conversations ?
item.description: Gemini, l'intelligence artificielle de Google, garde un historique de vos conversations. Pour des raisons de confidentialité ou simplement pour faire un peu de ménage, vous avez heureusement la possibilité de supprimer ces conversations. Voici comment faire.

item.title: Netflix can’t seem to follow up its biggest shows
item.description: It hasn't been that long since Stranger Things ended, but even still fans are clearly clamoring for more. The finale was overshadowed by a conspiracy about a secret episode, and an otherwise standard behind-the-scenes documentary became a hotbed for theorizing. Of course, given the scale of Stranger Things, Netflix was never going to let the […]

item.title: Sector Alarm : quel est le système de télésurveillance le moins cher ?
item.description: Sector est la solution pour que vous puissiez vous absenter sans craindre le pire.

item.title: Fuites de données : un Français a en moyenne 10 comptes piratés
item.description: Pensez à vos cartes de fidélité, vos applications du quotidien et vos abonnements : vos données personnelles se baladent probablement déjà dans la nature. Une récente étude vient de dresser le bilan des cyberattaques, et le palmarès de la France en ce début d'année 2026 fait froid dans le dos.

item.title: How to watch Australian Survivor: Redemption on 10Play (it's free)
item.description: Here's a round up of how to watch Australian Survivor: Redemption online, from anywhere and potentially free aside from the cost of a VPN.

item.title: For All Mankind creators drop first 'pulse-pounding' trailer for Star City — and I think the new Apple TV sci-fi space race drama could be even darker
item.description: Star City, a new space race drama from the creators of For All Mankind, has just launched its first trailer — and sci-fi on Apple TV has never been darker.

item.title: THE PEOPLE DO NOT YEARN FOR AUTOMATION
item.description: Today on Decoder, I want to lay out an idea that’s been banging around my head for weeks now as we’ve been reporting on AI and having conversations here on this show. I’ve been calling it software brain, and it’s a particular way of seeing the world that fits everything into algorithms, databases and loops […]

item.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
item.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco is in just a week. Now’s the time to grab yourself a ticket. Join VCs and founders at Sentro Filipino Cultural Center on April 30.

item.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
item.description: TechCrunch has confirmed that Delve was the compliance company that performed the security certifications for Context AI, the AI agent training startup that last week disclosed a security incident.

item.title: Labor unrest at Samsung may worsen memory chip supply issues
item.description: Tens of thousands of Samsung Electronics workers held a rally at the company’s Pyeongtaek campus in South Korea on Thursday to signal they are prepared to walk off the job for an 18-day strike next month.

item.title: This new Microsoft 365 Copilot feature could throw your GDPR compliance into question — here's how to check, and how turn it off
item.description: Microsoft wants to ease EU Copilot processing by having some data processed in the US, Canada, and Australia.

item.title: You’re about to feel the AI money squeeze
item.description: Earlier this month, millions of OpenClaw users woke up to a sweeping mandate: The viral AI agent tool, which this year took the worldwide tech industry by storm, had been severely restricted by Anthropic. Anthropic, like other leading AI labs, was under immense pressure to lessen the strain on its systems and start turning a […]

item.title: Un « échafaudage moléculaire » : la solution inattendue pour faire décoller la nouvelle génération de panneaux solaires en pérovskite
item.description: Concevoir des panneaux solaires pérovskite est une chose. Maintenir leurs performances sur le long terme en est une autre. Mais le défi est relevé pour cette équipe allemande, qui a développé une solution face au problème de durabilité lié à cette technologie.

item.title: Tesla drops Musk’s $29B ‘interim’ award after Delaware court restored larger pay package
item.description: The company is following through on its promise to not let Musk "double dip" if he won his appeal to restore Tesla's 2018 compensation package, worth $56 billion.

item.title: OctoTempo, la nouvelle offre d’Octopus Energy : 16h creuses en été, prix fixe 2 ans, mais est-ce mieux que Tempo EDF ?
item.description: Octopus Energy lance OctoTempo, une offre calquée sur la logique Tempo d'EDF mais avec ses propres règles : prix fixe pendant deux ans, jusqu'à 16 heures creuses par jour en été, et des tarifs jours rouges inférieurs à ceux d'EDF. Sur le papier, c'est séduisant. Dans la vraie vie, c'est un peu plus compliqué.

item.title: Starlink en 2026 : après deux ans de stagnation, les débits explosent en France
item.description: Après deux années de performances globalement stables, la connexion par satellite Starlink franchit un cap dans l'Hexagone en 2026. Selon une récente analyse de Zone ADSL&Fibre, les débits s'envolent et la latence fond, propulsant le service d'Elon Musk comme l'alternative numéro un face à la fermeture progressive du réseau ADSL.

item.title: Malgré son prix en hausse, le nouveau Samsung Galaxy A57 (256 Go) baisse déjà de 100 € chez Boulanger
item.description: Nouvelle référence de chez Samsung, le Galaxy A57 devrait séduire les personnes à la recherche d'un smartphone solide sans se ruiner. D'ailleurs, sa version 256 Go devient bien plus intéressante chez Boulanger grâce à 50 euros de remise immédiate et un bonus de reprise.

item.title: My favorite dating app just got even cooler with a new feed redesign
item.description: The dating app Pure launches an app redesign to help alleviate dating app fatigue.

item.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.

item.title: Want to live a longer, happier life? Science says work to be more successful (but not in the way you might think)
item.description: A decades-long (and counting) study reveals happiness lies not necessarily in the achievement, but in the pursuit. You want to be happier. You want to feel more fulfilled. You want to live a longer, healthier life.

item.title: United Airlines CEO just casually admitted that prices might stay high even after the Iran fuel crisis ends
item.description: In an earnings call on Wednesday, Scott Kirby indicated that airlines will not lower their prices to pre-war levels once fuel costs come down. Many consumers may be pausing their travel plans until whenever the U.S.-Iranian fuel crisis ends.
